project_type: Python PySide6 desktop application for darts league management
build_system: pip with requirements.txt (PySide6, openpyxl). No Makefile. CI uses GitHub Actions.
test_framework: pytest with tmp_path fixtures, conftest in tests/helpers/. Markers: integration. 151 tests pass, 70 skipped (GUI).
verification_instructions: 1) Run python -m mypy app - must be clean. 2) Run python -m pytest -q --tb=short - all tests pass. 3) No regressions in existing 151 tests.
setup_instructions: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt (includes PySide6, openpyxl, pytest, mypy)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Python 3.11 default. PySide6 GUI tests are skipped (no display). No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: All UI in Russian. mypy clean. pytest green. Brand: Darts Liga. Schema migrations via CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and _column_exists. Logging to logs/. Update planning docs after completion.
key_patterns: Services: frozen dataclass results, sqlite3.Connection as parameter, audit logging via AuditLogService. UI: QDialog for forms, QTableWidget for lists, tooltip on buttons, QSS themes. Schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS in schema.py with _column_exists for migrations. Settings: JSON via app/settings.py. Structure: app/services/ for business logic, app/ui/ for Qt, app/db/ for data access, app/domain/ for pure domain logic. MainWindow uses QTabWidget with named tabs. Import uses pipeline: parse -> review -> apply pattern.
directory_structure: app/ - main application code. app/ui/ - all Qt views and dialogs. app/services/ - business logic services. app/db/ - database schema, connection, repositories. app/domain/ - pure domain logic (rating, points, tournament lifecycle). tests/ - pytest test files. planning/ - project planning documents. logs/ - application logs.
